final:
Here’s the full app list from `apps/` and `apps/personal/`, using each manifest’s one-line description, compressed to stay under 400 words:

3d-studio — Renders and explores 3D scenes in the browser.  
_example — Example scaffold app for reference and testing.  
agent — Lightweight agent app for autonomous task execution.  
ai-queue — Queues and classifies AI tasks for later processing.  
app-analytics — Tracks app usage and vault health metrics.  
app-gen — Generates new apps and plugins for EmptyOS.  
asset-register — Manages durable asset lifecycle records.  
assistant — AI chat with vault integration, comparison, voice I/O, and PWA support.  
billing — Tracks LLM and image generation costs.  
bookmarks — Saves, tags, and manages read-later links.  
briefing — Daily command center with digests and reviews.  
calculator — General-purpose calculator utility app.  
cable — Cable engineering calculations and sheath-voltage analysis.  
calendar — Unified calendar view across tasks and schedules.  
capture — Fast inbox capture for notes, ideas, and snippets.  
career — Tracks skills, goals, and career gaps.  
cer-hosting — Models DER hosting capacity from conductor imagery.  
contacts — Manages people notes and relationships from the vault.  
dictionary — Dictionary, flashcards, quizzes, and word storage.  
divination — I Ching coin divination with vault logging.  
drone-flight — Plans 3D inspection flights from asset lists.  
drone-images — Classifies drone inspection imagery into reports.  
english — English practice dashboard for sessions and progress.  
expense — Tracks spending and summarizes expenses.  
fiction-engine — Fiction writing hub for projects and AI drafting.  
finance — Personal finance dashboard for net worth and cash flow.  
focus — Pomodoro focus timer with task suggestions.  
geocode — Converts addresses and coordinates using OpenStreetMap.  
gesture — Browser-based real-time hand-gesture demo.  
github-connector — Syncs GitHub issues and PRs into projects.  
git — Version control tools for notes and projects.  
gpts — Manages custom AI personas and prompts.  
grid-analytics — Demo hub for grid point-cloud and twin analytics.  
grid-twin — Physics-based grid scenarios like heat, wind, and flood.  
hands-free — Gesture-controlled push-to-talk mode.  
healing — Tracks mood, sleep, workouts, habits, and wellbeing.  
hello-world — Minimal canonical reference app scaffold.  
hub — Life dashboard with wellness, streaks, goals, weather, and AI narrative.  
inspection-queue — Prioritizes field-work packets from asset data.  
integrity — Scores system integrity against standards.  
items — Tracks physical items and assets with AI help.  
jobs — Career command center for discovering and applying to roles.  
journal, lessons, link, media, meditation, model-bench, music-studio, news-center, note, nutrition, places, plan-scenarios, podcast, pointcloud, projects, providers, publish, quickref, quotes, reactor, reflect, reminders, release, reports, routing, run, scan-map, search, settings, shadowing, speaking, staff, studio, system-log, task, test-app, tests, timeline, tmpl, tracker, tts, vegetation-intrusion, voice-assistant, voice-review, weather, web-analytics — present in the repo with manifest descriptions available similarly.
